steps.title: Use the dispute clue
steps.content: The discrepancy in forest estimates is not surprising because researchers regularly dispute one another's classifications. The blank must name the thing scientists lack when they disagree about how to classify mature and old-growth forests.

steps.title: Reject mismatched nouns
steps.content: A would mean scientists lack interest, but they are actively studying the issue. B implies a lack of careful thought, not disagreement. C implies poor watchfulness, which the passage does not suggest. The answer is D.
